hero.subtitle: Premium Motorcycle Oils
hero.title: Fuel Your Ride with Bagani Power
hero.description: Gawang Pilipino, Para sa Pilipino! Bagani Oil delivers high-performance oils and lubricants engineered for every Filipino.

about.subtitle: about bagani
about.title: Engineered for performance, built for Filipino riders
about.description: Bagani is a proudly Filipino brand of motorcycle oils and lubricants, crafted with precision to keep every ride smooth, powerful, and protected.

testimonials.quote: Since switching to Bagani Amihan, my engine runs smoother and cooler. The quality is unmatched for the price. Proud to support a Filipino brand!
testimonials.author: Juan dela Cruz

testimonials.quote: I've tried many oil brands but Bagani Laon gives me the best engine protection for my delivery motorcycle. Highly recommended for heavy use!
testimonials.author: Mark Santos
